title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Kia India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!
